# Security Policy

We take the security of the Nexus Gaming Leaderboard System seriously. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, please review this policy to report it responsibly.

## Supported Versions

We actively provide security updates and patches for the following versions:

| Version | Supported    |
| ------- | ------------ |
| 1.0.x   | Yes (Active) |
| < 1.0.0 | No           |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities publicly via GitHub Issues. 

Instead, report security issues privately by emailing **stevesplash4@gmail.com**. Please include:
* A detailed description of the vulnerability and its potential impact.
* Detailed steps, payloads, or scripts required to reproduce the exploit.
* The specific engine or environment configuration affected.

We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours and work with you to analyze and patch the vulnerability before public disclosure.
